effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another player, subtract 1 (only in effect when you are attacking).

faq.q_en: Does this increase my weapon range?
faq.a_en: No. It modifies the distance to others, not the range of your weapon. It makes them appear 'closer' to you.

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another player, subtract 1 (only in effect when you are attacking).

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another player, subtract 1 (only in effect when you are attacking).

effect_cn: 你计算与其他角色的距离-1。
effect_en: When you calculate the distance to another player, subtract 1 (only in effect when you are attacking).

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
effect_en: When another player is calculating their range to you, add 1 (only in effect when you are being targeted).

faq.q_en: Does this work against tools like Snatch?
faq.a_en: Yes. Tools that require a specific distance (like Steal/Snatch) are affected by the distance modifier of a +1 horse.

effect_cn: 其他角色计算与你的距离+1。
effect_en: When another player is calculating their range to you, add 1 (only in effect when you are being targeted).
